name: capauth
capability: Sovereign M2M auth — PGP-based identity and secret access without OAuth
provider: CapAuth (sovereign PGP-based; skcapstone MCP integration)
brief: Sovereign PGP-based machine-to-machine auth that lets agents prove identity and fetch secrets without OAuth.

name: skca
capability: Internal PKI / mTLS — ACME for internal certs, X.509 mTLS service identity, SSH CA
provider: step-ca (ACME for internal endpoints, X.509 mTLS, SSH certificate authority)
brief: Internal certificate authority issuing TLS/SSH certs for service-to-service mTLS via ACME.

name: sksec
capability: Threat defense — reputation, runtime, host, and network intrusion detection
provider: CrowdSec (reputation/bouncer) + Falco (runtime eBPF) + Wazuh (HIDS/FIM/SIEM) + Suricata (NIDS)
brief: Layered threat defense combining reputation blocking, runtime eBPF detection, and intrusion monitoring.

name: sksso
capability: Identity / SSO — human SSO (OIDC/SAML/LDAP) + agent service-auth upgrade path
provider: Authentik (human SSO, OIDC/SAML/LDAP); Zitadel as M2M/agent service-auth upgrade path
brief: Single sign-on for humans (OIDC/SAML/LDAP) plus service-account identity for agents.

name: skvault
capability: Secrets management — pluggable backend: vault-file / HashiCorp Vault / CapAuth
provider: SKSecretBackend interface (secrets/interface.py): OpenBao (HA Raft, default) / vault-file (AES-256) / SOPS+age / CapAuth (PGP); HashiCorp Vault = compatible alt
brief: Pluggable secrets manager that stores and rotates credentials behind a single interface.

name: skwaf
capability: Web application firewall — OWASP Top 10 protection at the ingress layer
provider: Coraza WAF + OWASP CRS v4 (Traefik WASM plugin; BunkerWeb as GUI alternative)
brief: Web application firewall enforcing OWASP Top-10 protection at the edge (descriptor-only policy).

name: skbus
capability: Machine A2A event bus — durable pub/sub for agent-to-agent messaging
provider: NATS JetStream (10 MB binary, sub-millisecond latency, built-in persistence)
brief: Durable NATS JetStream event bus carrying agent-to-agent and service messages.

name: skchat
capability: Human/agent chat + federation — Matrix E2EE with federation bridge
provider: Tuwunel (Apache-2.0, Rust single-binary Matrix homeserver; conduwuit successor)
brief: Self-hosted Matrix chat homeserver with end-to-end encryption and federation for humans and agents.

name: skcomms
capability: Multi-channel outbound transport — subscribes to skbus, routes to external channels
provider: skcomms (sovereign, custom) — subscribes to NATS JetStream skbus
brief: Multi-channel outbound transport that subscribes to the bus and routes messages to email, Telegram, and more.

name: sksignaling
capability: Talk HPB — WebRTC signaling for scaled calls
provider: nextcloud-spreed-signaling (struktur)
brief: WebRTC signaling backend (Talk HPB) that scales group voice and video calls.

name: skvoice
capability: Voice/video RTC — SFU for agent-in-call (STT+TTS+LLM room participants)
provider: LiveKit (SFU + Agents framework: STT=Whisper, TTS=Chatterbox, LLM=Ollama)
brief: LiveKit SFU for real-time voice/video rooms, including agents joining calls with STT/TTS/LLM.

name: skbackup
capability: Backup — cluster state + persistent-volume data to sovereign object storage
provider: Velero (→ skobject S3; restic/kopia node-agent for filesystem PV data)
brief: Cluster and persistent-volume backup to sovereign S3 object storage via Velero.

name: skblock
capability: Block storage — replicated persistent volumes (RWO)
provider: Longhorn (Apache-2.0, K8s-native synchronous replication + S3 backup)
brief: Replicated block storage providing durable read-write-once persistent volumes (Longhorn).

name: skcache
capability: Cache / KV store — ephemeral data, session state, pub/sub
provider: Valkey (BSD-3, drop-in Redis replacement); DragonflyDB as scale alternative
brief: In-memory key/value cache and pub/sub for sessions and ephemeral state (Valkey).

name: skdata
capability: Relational + vector + graph + full-text search — consolidated Postgres multitool
provider: PostgreSQL 17 (skmem-pg:pg17-bm25-age image: pgvector + ParadeDB pg_search + Apache AGE — one engine)
brief: Consolidated Postgres providing relational, vector, graph, and full-text search in one engine.

name: skfile
capability: Shared file storage — POSIX RWX, many concurrent writers
provider: JuiceFS CE (Apache-2.0; data=skobject S3, metadata=PostgreSQL/skdata)
brief: Shared POSIX file storage allowing many concurrent writers over object-backed JuiceFS.

name: skfiles
capability: File sync and collaboration — web UI + peer-to-peer device sync + rich collaboration plane (Office, Talk, notify_push, Whiteboard)
provider: Nextcloud (collaboration/WebDAV) + Syncthing (p2p sync)
brief: Nextcloud-based file sync and collaboration with a web UI and peer-to-peer device sync.

name: skflow
capability: Automation / workflow — visual and code-first agent + human-in-loop pipelines
provider: Windmill (AGPLv3, OSI-open, code-first; visual + scripts)
brief: Code-first and visual automation/workflow engine for agent and human jobs (Windmill).

name: skmodel
capability: LLM / inference serving — stable seam for local and remote model serving
provider: Ollama (simple, wide model support); vLLM (high-throughput production serving)
brief: LLM inference serving layer giving a stable seam for local and remote models (Ollama/vLLM).

name: skmon
capability: Observability — metrics, logs, traces with OTel standard
provider: Prometheus (metrics) + Grafana (dashboards) + VictoriaLogs (logs, Apache-2.0, replaces Loki) + Tempo (traces) + Grafana Alloy (OTel)
brief: Observability stack for metrics, logs, and traces using the OpenTelemetry standard.

name: skobject
capability: Object / S3 storage — blob storage with S3-compatible API
provider: Garage (AGPLv3, single binary, S3-compatible); SeaweedFS for Object-Lock / large scale
brief: S3-compatible object/blob storage from a single Garage binary.

name: skoffice
capability: Online office (WOPI) — collaborative document editing
provider: Collabora Online (CODE)
brief: Collaborative online document editing via Collabora Online (WOPI).

name: skpulse
capability: Uptime / external status monitoring — endpoint probing and public status page
provider: Gatus (config-as-code uptime, feeds skops ITIL) + Prometheus Blackbox Exporter (internal probing)
brief: External uptime monitoring that probes endpoints and feeds status into ITIL ops.

name: skwhiteboard
capability: Collaborative whiteboard backend (ws)
provider: Nextcloud Whiteboard server (Node ws)
brief: Real-time collaborative whiteboard backend over websockets.

name: skcicd
capability: CI/CD — container image build + GitOps deployment pipeline
provider: Forgejo Actions (CI) + Ansible (node/Swarm CD) + ArgoCD (K8s GitOps)
brief: CI/CD pipeline building container images and deploying via GitOps (Forgejo Actions + Ansible).

name: skdns
capability: Sovereign DNS — internal authoritative + resolver/filter, split-horizon, DNS-01 ACME
provider: Technitium (self-host: authoritative + recursive + filtering + DoH/DoT/DoQ, one binary)
brief: Sovereign DNS server providing internal authoritative records plus a filtering resolver.

name: skdweb
capability: Decentralized availability + sovereign naming — IPFS pinning + seizure-proof names
provider: IPFS + IPFS-Cluster (content availability) + Handshake HNS / ENS (sovereign naming)
brief: Decentralized content availability and sovereign naming over IPFS pinning.

name: skfence
capability: Edge / ingress — TLS termination, rate limiting, socket proxy
provider: Traefik v3 + Coraza WAF (Traefik WASM plugin; Keepalived for Swarm HA / kube-vip for K8s)
brief: Edge ingress/reverse proxy handling TLS termination, rate limiting, and WAF (Traefik v3).

name: skinfra
capability: Infrastructure provisioning — cloud/on-prem VM and network lifecycle via IaC
provider: OpenTofu (Terraform-compatible, BSL-free)
brief: Infrastructure-as-code provisioning of VMs and networks via OpenTofu.

name: skmesh
capability: Overlay mesh / tunnels — sovereign WireGuard networking across nodes
provider: Netbird (self-hosted, sovereign target); Tailscale for ease + bootstrap; Pangolin as sovereign cloudflared replacement
brief: Sovereign WireGuard overlay mesh connecting nodes across networks (Netbird).

name: skturn
capability: WebRTC media relay — TURN/STUN for NAT traversal
provider: coturn 4.6 (host-published edge node; DNS grey-cloud / DNS-only)
brief: TURN/STUN media relay enabling WebRTC NAT traversal (coturn).
